client_updates.highlight: Zeam: DevNet 5 multi-message aggregation over 9 payloads takes 4–5s; target is <0.5s
Ream: min-signers crash fixed by requiring ≥3 signers; proposes continuing on DevNet 4 until stable
Lantern: new LPPDP and SSZ libraries integrated; Hive gossip tests passing; DevNet 5 support added
Ethlambda: fixed attestation fallback bug; merged block-building algorithm improvement; lean spec PR merged with test vectors
Gean: DevNet 4 consensus stable; async aggregation refactor brings latency in line with other clients

testing_progress.highlight: DevNet 4 (8 subnets, 64 validators): finality achieved to slot 56 then lost; P95 aggregation time is 3–4s across clients, target is <1s
Grandine/Qlean/Ream validators on shared servers hitting 3.5GB container memory cap, causing crashes
DevNet 4 is using Multisig library ~2 months old; upcoming breaking-change update expected to significantly boost performance
Decision: focus on DevNet 4 stability before moving to DevNet 5 broader validator scaling

infrastructure.highlight: LeanVM on Hetzner AX42U (~$50/month) achieves ~50% of M4 Max performance; custom Rust memory allocator yields additional ~20% gain

Shadow simulation fuzzer in development: randomizes subnets, aggregators, latency, bandwidth, client mix; supports Zeam and Qlean; needs artificial sleep flags from clients to simulate aggregation delay
Shadow sims viable for DevNet 5 interop testing while real aggregation times are being optimized

documentation.highlight: lean spec simplification underway: XMSS section simplified, type tests added; logic unchanged
LeanVM Python verifier (1,200 lines, excluding Poseidon/field arithmetic) completed; ZKDSL documentation next

action_items.action: Agree on common aggregation metric definition; add to lean spec as source of truth
Add configurable artificial-sleep flag for signature aggregation rate to support Shadow simulation

decisions.decision: Deprioritize DevNet 5 work; focus all teams on stabilizing DevNet 4 first
Use Shadow simulations to progress DevNet 5 interop testing in parallel with real performance work

targets.target: P95 aggregation time target: <1 second per client on DevNet 4
Multi-message aggregation (9 payloads) target: <0.4s before DevNet 5 launch
